ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "open" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded during the day */,
  "atr" TEXT /* Average True Range (ATR) of the stock */,
  "atr_2" TEXT /* Another version of ATR for comparison */,
  "moving_average" TEXT /* Moving average of the stock */,
  "relative_strength_index" TEXT /* Relative strength index (RSI) of the stock */,
  "bollinger_bands" TEXT /* Bollinger bands of the stock */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technical indicator */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the indicator */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Mathematical formula for the indicator */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter values for the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, trader, data analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report generation (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the prediction is made */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "predicted_price" TEXT /* Predicted price of the stock */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_version" INTEGER /* Version of the predictive model used */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the prediction */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the predictive model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_version FOREIGN KEY ("model_version") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictive model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the predictive model */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of predictive model (e.g., linear regression, decision tree, neural network) */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Training data used for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL for Apple Inc.) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock (e.g., technology, finance, healthcare) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
